Schools & Non-Profits

Bringing coding, robotics & STEM to more kids across Winnipeg.

We partner with Winnipeg schools and non-profit organizations to deliver hands-on tech education — on-site, in-class, or as co-hosted community events.

For Schools

Curriculum-aligned coding and robotics workshops, after-school programs, and full-semester enrichment for K–12.

Learn More

For Non-Profits

Sponsored seats, flexible group rates, and co-hosted community events that make tech education accessible.

Learn More

For Community Groups

Pop-up Hour of Code events, summer camps, and family STEM days tailored to your group.

Learn More

Let's build something together.

Tell us about your school or organization and we'll put together a plan that fits.

Book an Intro Call

Free trial · No commitment

Let your child try it.
You'll see the difference.

One free hour. A real class, a real project, and a clear picture of what your child walks away with.

A confident, proud kid

They'll show you something they built — and actually want to keep going.

Screen time that builds skills

Coding, problem-solving, and focus — instead of endless scrolling.

A real taste of class

Meet the instructors, see the curriculum, and watch your child in action.

Zero pressure to sign up

No sales pitch. Just an honest hour to see if it's the right fit.

LEARN MORE

Takes 1 hour · Both Winnipeg locations · Ages 6–18

Ready to see your child light up?

Book a free trial class — no pressure, no contracts.

Try a Free Class

Turning screen time into something parents feel great about. We help kids ages 6–18 build confidence, focus, and real-world skills through coding and STEM.
